props.name: handleHomeEndKeys
props.comment: If true, Home/End keys scroll the dropdown list to the first/last item

props.name: emptyValue
props.comment: The underlying form value stored when the selection is cleared. Defaults to empty string.

props.name: emptyText
props.comment: Label of a '(none)' entry prepended when the field is not required, allowing users to clear the selection

props.name: clearOnBlur
props.comment: If true, clears the search text in the input when the input loses focus
